data.content: Implementation complete (retake). Matched conversation log color scheme to the terminal panel: backgrounds changed from near-black (#020617) to terminal's warm dark purple-blue (#1a1a2e/#16162a), text changed from low-contrast slate classes to terminal's #e0e0e0 foreground. All font sizes bumped +1px (minimum 12px for labels, 14px for content, 16px for title). Borders lightened to slate-500/60. Both files: agent-history-view.tsx (session cards, entry rows, headers, empty states) and interaction-picker.tsx (toolbar, dropdowns, filter options). Pure class replacements, 81 insertions / 81 deletions. All quality gates pass: lint 0 errors, typecheck clean, 2172 tests pass, build succeeds.
